description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Run Unit Tests that triggers on pull requests, pushes to master and next branches, and on workflow dispatch. The workflow runs tests on multiple operating systems (macOS-latest, ubuntu-latest, windows-latest) with different Python versions (3.6 to 3.11) using a matrix strategy, checking out the code, setting up a Python environment with miniconda, installing the project with pip, and running tests with pytest.
